download the app United States No items found.
RUN x LIFT Instructor led, driven by you.
Run cardio Interval Cardio Go at your pace on top-of-the-line Woodway treadmills with instructors leading you at step.
Walk, jog, run, or sprint - the class is yours.If running isn’t for you, opt for a double floor spot.
You’ll spend the whole class strength training on the floor.
Our weekly schedule takes you through a daily muscle focus that targets different parts of your body for a balanced training regimen.
PRO TIP: If you prefer not to run, skip the treadmill and book a double floor spot.
High energy, inclusive community A Simple Format You’ll rotate between treadmill and floor (or choose Double Floor).
The coach guides every interval.
Go at your pace Walk, jog, or run.
Lift lighter or heavier.
Options and modifications are always available.
The instructor guides every interval.
Go at your pace Walk, jog, or run.
Lift lighter or heavier.
Options and modifications are always available.
High energy, Inclusive community Once you make it to the Red Room, you have the support of an entire community to keep you motivated.
book your first class Learn more about the workout BEST-IN-CLASS FITNESS INSTRUCTORS JOIN THE HUSTLE New to Barry’s?
You’re in good hands.
Our instructors cue every interval, offer options for every level, and help you feel confident fast.
BOOK YOUR FIRST CLASS MORE THAN JUST A WORKOUT YOU'RE EXACTLY WHERE YOU NEED TO BE Fuel Bar Real nutrition, unreal convenience.
The Barry’s Fuel Bar offers high-performance shakes and supplements that power your body without slowing down your life.
PRO TIP: Pre-order your shake before class so it's waiting for you once you're done.
Locker Rooms Private showers, plush towels, and Dyson hair dryers.
THE BARRY'S SHOP From iconic Barry's apparel to exclusive collaborations, the Barry's Shop brings Red Room power into your daily life.
Explore The Barry's Shop Explore All Amenities 8+ Million Strong Join a global community that shows up, works hard, and starts exactly where you are.
The best workout around!
It can be intimidating to go to a new gym, but because Barry’s fosters such a wonderful sense of community I’ve always felt welcomed.
Andrew Great clubs, great vibes and community.
When you think you can't go to a class or make it through before you know it the music and instructors have you hitting above your best.
James S Barry’s is honestly the perfect place for anyone who wants to train effectively in a short time and really feel the results!
The energy, the music, and the professionalism of the coaches make all the difference.
Your submission has been received!
Something went wrong while submitting the form.

designIntent.summary: Referencia de energia fisica com sala escura, vermelho dominante, cards de aula e CTA de reserva rapido.
designIntent.hero: Energia de estudio, reservas e comunidade em alta tensao.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Pulse Halo
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 22%, rgba(196,18,48,.38), transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 68%, rgba(242,169,0,.18), transparent 38%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

fontFamilies.loading: local when available; fallback stack otherwise

icons.rule: icone nao desloca layout no hover

risks: Vermelho sobre preto precisa tamanho e peso.
Nao copiar formulario de reserva final.

rules: Hero full viewport com foto de treino em contraste alto.
Menu deve abrir como timetable de estudio.
CTA de booking usa vermelho cheio e glow curto.
Motion parece batida: rapido, mas controlado.

menuSystem.note: Menu timetable: forte, rapido e com foco em agendamento.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.purpose: Insumo de energia fitness premium. Cruza com DS do cliente para criar intensidade sem sacrificar legibilidade.
nonGoals: nao criar DS final do cliente
nao usar padrao generico para todos os sites
differentiationRules: Hero full viewport com foto de treino em contraste alto.
Menu deve abrir como timetable de estudio.
CTA de booking usa vermelho cheio e glow curto.
Motion parece batida: rapido, mas controlado.
referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.

globalTokens.radius: 0-10px conforme referencia; cards ate 8px salvo marcas arredondadas
